ddls:
CREATE TABLE "influencers" (
  "influencer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each influencer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the influencer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the influencer */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the influencer's account */,
  "social_media_handle" TEXT /* Social media handle of the influencer */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL to the influencer's profile picture */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Brief description of the influencer */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the influencer joined the platform */,
  "last_active" TEXT /* Last time the influencer was active on the platform */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the influencer */,
  "verification_status" INTEGER /* Verification status of the influencer */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* Links to the influencer's social media profiles */,
  "contact_information" TEXT /* Additional contact information like phone number */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("influencer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "channels" (
  "channel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each channel */,
  "influencer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the influencer who owns the channel */,
  "channel_name" TEXT /* Name of the channel */,
  "social_media_platform" TEXT /* Social media platform where the channel is hosted (e.g., YouTube, TikTok, Twitch) */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the channel was created */,
  "subscribers" INTEGER /* Number of subscribers to the channel */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the channel */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags or keywords associated with the channel */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL to the channel's profile picture */,
  "banner_image" TEXT /* URL to the channel's banner image */,
  "language" TEXT /* Primary language of the channel */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("channel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_channels_influencer_id FOREIGN KEY ("influencer_id") REFERENCES influencers ("influencer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "channel_earnings" (
  "earning_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each earnings entry */,
  "channel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the channel that the earnings belong to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the earnings entry */,
  "views" INTEGER /* Number of views for the channel */,
  "views_nett" INTEGER /* Number of views (nett) for the channel */,
  "gross_low" REAL /* Gross earnings (low) for the channel */,
  "gross_high" REAL /* Gross earnings (high) for the channel */,
  "estimated_earnings_low" REAL /* Estimated earnings (low) for the channel */,
  "estimated_earnings_high" REAL /* Estimated earnings (high) for the channel */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the earnings are reported */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the earnings (e.g., ads, sponsorships, merchandise) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("earning_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_channel_earnings_channel_id FOREIGN KEY ("channel_id") REFERENCES channels ("channel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "social_media_platforms" (
  "platform_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each social media platform */,
  "platform_name" TEXT /* Name of the social media platform (e.g., YouTube, TikTok, Twitch) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the social media platform */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL to the social media platform */,
  "logo" TEXT /* URL to the logo of the social media platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("platform_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "advertisers" (
  "advertiser_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each advertiser */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the advertiser */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the advertiser */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the advertiser's account */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the company */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the company */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the company */,
  "verification_status" INTEGER /* Verification status of the advertiser */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("advertiser_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaigns" (
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each campaign */,
  "advertiser_id" INTEGER /* ID of the advertiser who owns the campaign */,
  "campaign_name" TEXT /* Name of the campaign */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the campaign */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the campaign */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget for the campaign */,
  "campaign_type" TEXT /* Type of the campaign (e.g., video, banner, influencer) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the campaign (e.g., active, paused, completed) */,
  "target_audience" TEXT /* Target audience for the campaign */,
  "ad_copy" TEXT /* Content of the ad */,
  "ad_image_video" TEXT /* URL to the ad image or video */,
  "clicks" INTEGER /* Number of clicks */,
  "conversions" INTEGER /* Number of conversions */,
  "roi" REAL /* Return on investment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "influencer_campaigns" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each influencer-campaign pair */,
  "influencer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the influencer who participated in the campaign */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campaign that the influencer participated in */,
  "influencer_earnings" REAL /* Earnings for the influencer from the campaign */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the influencer's participation (e.g., active, completed) */,
  "commission_rate" REAL /* Commission rate for the influencer */,
  "impressions" INTEGER /* Number of impressions */,
  "clicks" INTEGER /* Number of clicks */,
  "conversions" INTEGER /* Number of conversions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_influencer_campaigns_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES campaigns ("campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_influencer_campaigns_influencer_id FOREIGN KEY ("influencer_id") REFERENCES influencers ("influencer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "niche" (
  "niche_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each niche */,
  "niche_name" TEXT /* Name of the niche */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the niche */,
  "parent_niche" INTEGER /* ID of the parent niche if the niche is a sub-niche */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("niche_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "influencer_niche" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each influencer-niche pair */,
  "influencer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the influencer */,
  "niche_id" INTEGER /* ID of the niche */,
  "primary_niche" INTEGER /* Indicates if the niche is the primary niche for the influencer */,
  "secondary_niche" INTEGER /* Indicates if the niche is the secondary niche for the influencer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_influencer_niche_niche_id FOREIGN KEY ("niche_id") REFERENCES niche ("niche_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_influencer_niche_influencer_id FOREIGN KEY ("influencer_id") REFERENCES influencers ("influencer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audience" (
  "audience_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audience */,
  "influencer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the influencer */,
  "age_range" TEXT /* Age range of the audience */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the audience */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the audience */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used by the audience */,
  "language" TEXT /* Primary language of the audience */,
  "time_zone" TEXT /* Time zone of the audience */,
  "interest" TEXT /* Interests of the audience */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audience_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audience_influencer_id FOREIGN KEY ("influencer_id") REFERENCES influencers ("influencer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "engagement" (
  "engagement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engagement entry */,
  "influencer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the influencer */,
  "likes" INTEGER /* Number of likes */,
  "comments" INTEGER /* Number of comments */,
  "shares" INTEGER /* Number of shares */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the engagement */,
  "engagement_type" TEXT /* Type of engagement (e.g., like, comment, share) */,
  "post_id" TEXT /* ID of the post if applicable */,
  "content_type" TEXT /* Type of content (e.g., video, photo, text) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engagement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_engagement_influencer_id FOREIGN KEY ("influencer_id") REFERENCES influencers ("influencer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics entry */,
  "influencer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the influencer */,
  "views" INTEGER /* Number of views */,
  "engagement_rate" REAL /* Engagement rate */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the analytics entry */,
  "follower_growth" INTEGER /* Growth in followers */,
  "average_watch_time" INTEGER /* Average watch time for videos */,
  "top_content" TEXT /* Top-performing content */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_influencer_id FOREIGN KEY ("influencer_id") REFERENCES influencers ("influencer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "influencer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the influencer */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date of payment */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount paid */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used (e.g., bank transfer, PayPal) */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* Transaction ID for the payment */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., pending, completed, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_influencer_id FOREIGN KEY ("influencer_id") REFERENCES influencers ("influencer_id")
)
